{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322013134FF4A3ABE9CC6AB97A382"}"},"total":4364},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7586702362227458840","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"超级好看的小说，情节，人物设计都很棒，初看宫照壁这个名字很奇怪，后来看的时候壁壁酱已经深入人心了，很可爱的妹子，娇羞，温柔，体贴，甯宝活泼，戴玉婵反差，还有老贾这个损友，周雪残疾但内心善良黄色，孙凤娇温柔的女汉子，角色塑造都是立体的，情节设计很合理，没有毒点，看的很舒服，，作者也很努力，每天更那么多，期待这本书爆火，让作者赚很多"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1766419804,"group_id":"7560309106351819800","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9rvDTtzgnM/vQSytZk1fQk=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776700848&x-signature=IqKiHTwWvdI9JXrGcbswfncov9s%3D","user_id":"63603117355","user_name":"爱吃焖烧羊肉的叶扁舟"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"63603117355","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7560309106351819800","book_info":{"abstract":"【多女+轻松】
人在高二，破产系统早到十年。
【二十七岁，公司破产，上亿债务让你喘不过气，站在楼顶天台抽烟到凌晨，你终于想明白一件事，自己连死亡都不恐惧，难道还怕从头再来？通过最后的人情，进入MBA商学院。讲台上的老师有着你无法想象的深厚背景。
任务：要到老师的私人号码，奖励：100RMB。】
秦洺看着讲台上略显发福的普通中年人，沉思半天。
“不是......老刘是特么我看着长大的，他有什么背景是我不知道的？”
还有......寄吧系统，你来早了吧？！
要到号码，看着银行卡余额增加，秦洺瞳孔地震。
系统不但来早了，还玩真的。
【叮！你的银行卡突然收到一笔转账，这笔钱解决了你的燃眉之急，你多方打听后得知，是你的高中同桌宫照壁，听说你破产以后，悄悄给你打了一笔钱。上学期间，你帮助她很多，甚至改变了她的一生，是她心头的白月光。
任务：与当年无疾而终的宫照壁重新联系，奖励：200RMB。】
秦玄扭头看向身旁低头不语的内向少女。
啊？
我？
她的白月光？！
出生系统，你别搞我啊！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/305108783843f2d4ec1322961f6678e3","author":"爱吃扣肉饭","author_id":"","book_id":"7560309106351819800","book_name":"刚上高二，破产逆袭系统来了！","book_short_name":"洺洺白白","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#c8e0e8","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"24.1万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7560309197816988184","read_count":"240615","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1445001"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.3","serial_count":"655","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/46b420920e083b8d5ee76550031afc23~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779298294&x-signature=ixVyLUZZlJgtCXRkuNLynllLWDQ%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"646138509146699","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"310"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322013134FF4A3ABE9CC6AB97A382"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读7小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":34,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":24476,"reply_count":3,"show_pv":17987},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7575380558697120574","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"挺好看的，玩梗也是挺有意思的，不是什么烂梗都玩，也不是乱玩梗，属于刚刚好的那种，而且主角配角都很有特色，÷生的÷生，bt
